name: Shiva's Guard
description: Said to have belonged to a goddess, today it retains much of its former power.

abilities.name: Arctic Blast
abilities.description: Emits an expanding freezing wave that follows and covers an area around the caster, dealing damage and slowing movement speed of enemies as it reaches them. Cooldown: 27. Mana Cost: 75. Radius: 825. Damage: 260. Move Speed Slow: 40%. Slow Duration: 4. Also weakens enemies hit by the wave, applying a debuff that amplifies any spell damage they take. The debuff is applied before the ability's damage is applied.

abilities.name: Freezing Aura
abilities.description: Reduces the attack speed of nearby enemies. Radius: 1200. Attack Speed Slow: 45. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
